overview: RetinaAI is an AI-powered diabetic retinopathy self-screening app for patients. Log in, enter your health details, upload a fundus eye image, and instantly get a DR severity result with a visual heatmap, risk level, and plain-language guidance. View your full scan history, download PDF reports, and share results via link.
features: Internet Identity login with private data isolation
Health profile (name, age, diabetes type, HbA1c)
Fundus image upload with AI DR classification (No DR to Proliferative)
Grad-CAM heatmap overlay with toggle and opacity control
Risk level display (Low/Moderate/High) with guidance text
Shareable result links (no login required to view)
